actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A Tyrone engineering firm is to create 11 new jobs.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man from San Diego finds a sea lion pup sleeping on his swimming trunks.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A petrol tanker has exploded in Mozambique, killing at least 50 people.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A stunt man from Cornwall has died after a safety net collapsed at Kent County Showground.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Enda Kenny will be acting Taoiseach (prime minister) until 6 April when a vote on nominations takes place.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Exeter Chiefs' player, Viliame Matawalu, has been charged with sexually assaulting a woman at a pub in the city centre on 3 December.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has appeared in court charged with attempted murder after a car crash in South Yorkshire in which four children were injured.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Pakistan's Mohammad Asif has been cleared to play in the third Test against England after his action was found to be legal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A British woman has died in a car crash in South Africa.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police Scotland has posted a series of tweets about Santa Claus.
